## Validation checklist

<!-- From the create-skill superpower. Check each item before submitting. -->

- [ ] Frontmatter `name` matches directory name
- [ ] Frontmatter `description` is one clear sentence
- [ ] File is at `skills/<category>/<name>/SKILL.md`
- [ ] No significant overlap with existing skills
- [ ] Follows the template (has When to Use, The Process, Key Principles)
- [ ] Under 80 lines
- [ ] Every step is actionable (tells the agent what to *do*)
- [ ] Testable — you can verify the agent followed the skill by looking at output
